arn.title: ARN
arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the EC2 instance

status.title: Status
status.description: The status of the ECS cluster

capacityProviders.description: The capacity providers associated with the cluster

repositoryUri.description: The URI of the ECR repository

registryId.title: Registry ID
registryId.description: The AWS account ID of the registry

createdAt.title: Created At
createdAt.description: The date and time the repository was created

imageTagMutability.title: Image Tag Mutability
imageTagMutability.description: The tag mutability setting for the repository

repositoryName.title: Repository Name
repositoryName.description: The name of the ECR repository containing this image

imageTag.title: Image Tag

imageDigest.description: The sha256 digest of the image manifest

imageSizeInBytes.title: Image Size (Bytes)
imageSizeInBytes.description: The size of the image in bytes

artifactMediaType.description: The media type of the artifact associated with the image

vulnerabilityCount.title: Vulnerability Count
vulnerabilityCount.description: Total number of vulnerabilities found in the image
